user.title: Who is your current energy retailer?
user.description: Select your current provider. PriceHawk will calculate how much you'd save by switching to the alternatives. GloBird and Flow Power are always available as comparators (no account needed). Amber and LocalVolts require an API key from your existing customer account.

amber_credentials.title: Connect to Amber Electric
amber_credentials.description: Enter your Amber Electric API key. You can generate one in the Amber app under Developers > Generate Token.

data_description.api_key: Your Amber Electric API token from the developer portal

flow_power_credentials.title: Connect Flow Power
flow_power_credentials.description: Pick your NEM region. Wholesale spot price is sourced directly from AEMO NEMWeb (no API key required). Happy Hour FiT 5:30-7:30pm: 45c NSW/QLD/SA, 35c VIC, 0c TAS.

localvolts_credentials.title: Connect LocalVolts
localvolts_credentials.description: Enter your LocalVolts API credentials. Find them in your LocalVolts customer dashboard under Developer / API Integration.

site_select.title: Select Amber Site
site_select.description: Your Amber account has multiple sites. Select the one to use for price comparison.

data_description.site_id: Sites show NMI, network, and status (active/closed)

cdr_retailer.title: Pick your retailer (CDR)
cdr_retailer.description: Choose your retailer to import its plan list directly from the Consumer Data Right API. If your retailer is not listed, pick "Skip CDR — enter rates manually" to use the legacy form-based entry.

cdr_locale.title: Narrow plans by location
cdr_locale.description: Big retailers publish a plan for every distributor (NSW alone has 3 — Ausgrid, Endeavour, Essential). Enter your postcode OR pick a state to narrow the list before you scroll. Leave both blank to see every plan the retailer publishes.

cdr_distributor.title: Pick your distributor
cdr_distributor.description: Distributors known for {state}. Your network distributor is on your bill (e.g. Ausgrid for most Sydney homes, Powercor for most western Vic homes). Pick "Any" to skip this filter.

cdr_plan_select.title: Pick your CDR plan
cdr_plan_select.description: PriceHawk found the published plans for this retailer. Pick the one matching your current bill. Choose "Skip" to fall back to manual rate entry.

cdr_confirm.title: Confirm plan: {plan_name}

cdr_error.title: CDR fetch problem
cdr_error.description: PriceHawk couldn't load the {kind} data on attempt {attempt} of {max}. Retry now (the retailer's data holder may be transient), or skip CDR and enter rates manually.

cdr_override.title: Optional: override CDR plan fields
cdr_override.description: Paste a JSON fragment to override any field in the CDR plan. Useful when CDR data is stale (e.g. rates haven't refreshed) or when a section is missing. Leave blank to use CDR data as-is.

globird_plan.title: GloBird Energy Plan
globird_plan.description: Select your GloBird plan or choose Custom to enter your own rates. Known plans pre-fill rates from current fact sheets — you can customise any value in the next steps.

data_description.plan_type: ZEROHERO is TOU with incentives, BOOST and GLOSAVE are flat-rate stepped plans

globird_rates.title: GloBird Import Rates
globird_rates.description: Enter your import electricity rates (incl. GST). For TOU plans, set the time windows when each rate applies. Use 24hr format with comma-separated ranges for multiple windows.

data_description.daily_supply_charge: Fixed daily charge from your energy bill, in cents per day (incl. GST)
data_description.demand_charge: Optional demand tariff charged per kW of peak demand per day. Set to 0 if your plan doesn't have demand charges
data_description.tariff_type: TOU = different rates at different times. Flat Stepped = one rate up to a threshold, then a higher rate
data_description.step1_threshold_kwh: Usage threshold in kWh per day before the higher rate kicks in
data_description.step1_rate: Rate for usage up to the threshold (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.step2_rate: Rate for usage above the threshold (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.peak_rate: Rate during peak periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.peak_windows: When peak rates apply. Format: HH:MM-HH:MM, e.g. 15:00-21:00. Use commas for multiple windows: 07:00-09:00, 17:00-20:00
data_description.shoulder_rate: Rate during shoulder periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.shoulder_windows: When shoulder rates apply. Same format as peak windows. Times must not overlap with peak or off-peak
data_description.offpeak_rate: Rate during off-peak periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.offpeak_windows: When off-peak rates apply. Same format as peak windows. Times must not overlap with peak or shoulder

globird_export.title: GloBird Export Rates (Feed-in Tariff)
globird_export.description: Enter your solar feed-in tariff rates (incl. GST). These are the credits you receive for exporting excess solar to the grid.

data_description.export_peak_rate: Feed-in credit during peak export periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.export_peak_windows: When peak export rates apply. Format: HH:MM-HH:MM
data_description.export_shoulder_rate: Feed-in credit during shoulder export periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.export_shoulder_windows: When shoulder export rates apply. Format: HH:MM-HH:MM
data_description.export_offpeak_rate: Feed-in credit during off-peak export periods (c/kWh incl. GST)
data_description.export_offpeak_windows: When off-peak export rates apply. Format: HH:MM-HH:MM

incentives.title: GloBird Incentives
incentives.description: Enable the incentives that apply to your plan. These affect cost calculations.

data_description.zerohero_credit: $1/day credit when grid imports stay below 0.03 kWh/hr during the ZEROHERO window
data_description.zerohero_window_start: Start of the ZEROHERO credit window in 24hr format (e.g. 18:00)
data_description.zerohero_window_end: End of the ZEROHERO credit window in 24hr format (e.g. 21:00)
data_description.super_export: Bonus export rate for exports during the super export window
data_description.super_export_cap_kwh: Maximum kWh eligible for the super export rate per day
data_description.super_export_window_start: Start of the super export window in 24hr format (e.g. 18:00)
data_description.super_export_window_end: End of the super export window in 24hr format (e.g. 21:00)
data_description.super_export_rate: Rate in c/kWh for exports during the super export window (replaces normal export rate)

amber_fees.title: Amber Bill Fees
amber_fees.description: Enter the fixed daily charges from your Amber Electric bill. These are added to Amber's wholesale cost to make the comparison fair with GloBird.

data_description.amber_network_daily_charge: Distributor/metering fee from your Amber bill (e.g. 15.78 c/day). Find this under 'Network Daily Supply Charge' on your bill.
data_description.amber_subscription_fee: Amber's subscription fee from your bill (e.g. 82.20 c/day). Find this under 'Amber Subscription' on your bill.

sensor_select.title: Grid Power Sensor
sensor_select.description: Select the sensor that measures your grid power. It must report in watts (W) or kilowatts (kW). Positive values = importing from grid, negative values = exporting to grid.

data_description.grid_power_sensor: Usually from your smart meter, solar inverter, or energy monitor (e.g. Powerwall, Envoy, P1 meter)

dashboard_token.title: Final Setup
dashboard_token.description: Optionally add a long-lived access token for the live dashboard. You can skip this and add one later via the options menu.

data_description.ha_token: For the live dashboard: go to your HA Profile > Security > Long-Lived Access Tokens > Create Token. Name it 'PriceHawk'. Leave blank to skip.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Amber API key. Please check your key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Amber Electric API. Please check your network and try again.
error.no_active_sites: No sites found on your Amber account. Please check your Amber account is set up.
error.peak_shoulder_overlap: Peak and Shoulder time windows overlap. Each time slot can only belong to one period.
error.peak_offpeak_overlap: Peak and Off-Peak time windows overlap. Each time slot can only belong to one period.
error.shoulder_offpeak_overlap: Shoulder and Off-Peak time windows overlap. Each time slot can only belong to one period.
error.incomplete_tou_coverage: Your TOU time windows don't cover all 24 hours. Uncovered periods will be charged at 0 c/kWh.
error.cdr_registry_unavailable: Could not load the retailer registry. The jxeeno endpoint may be down or your network is blocking github.com.
error.cdr_list_unavailable: Could not load this retailer's plan list. Their Consumer Data Right data holder may be temporarily offline.
error.cdr_detail_unavailable: Could not fetch the chosen plan's details. The planId may be stale, or the data holder is rate-limiting.
error.cdr_empty_unavailable: This retailer's CDR list returned no residential electricity plans. Pick a different retailer or skip to manual.
error.cdr_override_invalid_json: Override field isn't valid JSON. Paste a JSON object that maps electricityContract.dailySupplyCharge (or other fields), or leave blank to skip.
error.cdr_invalid_postcode: Not a valid Australian postcode. Use a 4-digit number, or pick a state from the dropdown instead.

menu_options.comparators: Toggle Comparators (Amber / Flow Power / LocalVolts) + Opt-Ins

comparators.title: Comparator providers + opt-in fields
comparators.description: Toggle which alternative providers PriceHawk evaluates against your current plan. Opt-in fields drive incentive math the integration can't infer from CDR data alone.

data.ovo_interest_balance_aud: OVO credit balance ($AUD) — drives 3% interest credit
data.vpp_batteries_enrolled: Batteries enrolled in retailer VPP (ENGIE / EA PowerResponse)

cdr_pick.title: Switch CDR plan — pick retailer
cdr_pick.description: Pick your retailer to load its latest CDR plan list. Pick "Skip" to return to the menu without changing anything.

cdr_plan_pick.title: Switch CDR plan — pick plan
cdr_plan_pick.description: Pick the plan to load. Pick "Cancel" to back out and keep your current CDR plan.

flow_power.title: Flow Power
flow_power.description: Add Flow Power as a comparator. Wholesale spot price is sourced from your Amber API connection (spotPerKwh field). Happy Hour FiT 5:30-7:30pm: 45c NSW/QLD/SA, 35c VIC, 0c TAS.

data_description.flow_power_region: Your NEM region — Happy Hour FiT rate depends on this
data_description.flow_power_daily_supply: Daily fixed charge in cents per day (default 100c)
data_description.flow_power_pea_enabled: PEA = wholesale - TWAP - 1.7c benchmark. A negative PEA is a discount.
data_description.flow_power_pea_override: Override the dynamic PEA with a fixed value (leave blank to compute automatically)

localvolts.title: LocalVolts
localvolts.description: Add LocalVolts as a comparator. Requires API credentials from your LocalVolts account. Coverage: ACT, NSW, QLD, SA, TAS.

data_description.localvolts_nmi: Your National Metering Identifier (10 or 11 digits)
data_description.localvolts_buy_ceiling: Imports above this rate will be capped (modelled as if you didn't import)
data_description.localvolts_sell_floor: Exports below this rate earn nothing instead of paying to export (negative spot)

amber_api_key.title: Update Amber API Key
amber_api_key.description: Enter your new Amber Electric API key. If your account has multiple sites, you'll be able to choose which one to use.

options_site_select.title: Select Amber Site
options_site_select.description: Choose which Amber site to use for pricing.

amber_fees.title: Amber Bill Fees
amber_fees.description: Update the fixed daily charges from your Amber Electric bill.

data_description.amber_network_daily_charge: Distributor/metering fee from your Amber bill (e.g. 15.78 c/day)
data_description.amber_subscription_fee: Amber's subscription fee from your bill (e.g. 82.20 c/day)

globird_plan.title: GloBird Energy Plan
globird_plan.description: Change your GloBird plan type. This will reset rates to the plan defaults.

globird_rates.title: GloBird Import Rates
globird_rates.description: Update your import electricity rates (incl. GST). Edit time windows in 24hr format (e.g. 15:00-21:00). Use commas for multiple windows.

data_description.daily_supply_charge: Fixed daily charge in cents per day (incl. GST)
data_description.demand_charge: Optional demand tariff in cents per kW of peak demand per day. Set to 0 if not applicable
data_description.shoulder_windows: Must not overlap with peak or off-peak windows
data_description.offpeak_windows: Must not overlap with peak or shoulder windows

globird_export.title: GloBird Export Rates (Feed-in Tariff)
globird_export.description: Update your solar feed-in tariff rates and time windows (incl. GST).

incentives.title: GloBird Incentives
incentives.description: Update the incentives that apply to your plan.

data_description.zerohero_credit: $1/day credit when grid imports stay below 0.03 kWh/hr between 6-8pm
data_description.critical_peak_export: $1/kWh credit for exports during critical peak events
data_description.critical_peak_import: 5c/kWh credit for reducing imports during critical peak events
data_description.prompt_payment_discount: 5% discount when bill paid on time

sensor_select.title: Grid Power Sensor
sensor_select.description: Change the sensor used for grid power measurement.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Amber Electric API.
error.no_active_sites: No sites found on your Amber account.
error.peak_shoulder_overlap: Peak and Shoulder time windows overlap.
error.peak_offpeak_overlap: Peak and Off-Peak time windows overlap.
error.shoulder_offpeak_overlap: Shoulder and Off-Peak time windows overlap.
error.incomplete_tou_coverage: Your TOU time windows don't cover all 24 hours. Uncovered periods will be charged at 0 c/kWh.
